mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_login_id, u.user_name, u.user_email, u.user_password, u.user_phone, u.user_type, u.user_status, u.user_requested_at, u.user_approved_at, b.business_id, b.business_regist_num, b.business_name, b.business_address, b.business_post FROM user_table u LEFT JOIN business_table b ON u.user_id = b.user_id WHERE u.user_login_id = #{loginId}

SELECT u.user_id, u.user_login_id, u.user_name, u.user_email, u.user_password, u.user_phone, u.user_type, u.user_status, u.user_requested_at, u.user_approved_at, b.business_id, b.business_regist_num, b.business_name, b.business_address, b.business_post FROM user_table u LEFT JOIN business_table b ON u.user_id = b.user_id WHERE u.user_email = #{userEmail}

SELECT u.user_id, u.user_login_id, u.user_name, u.user_email, u.user_password, u.user_phone, u.user_type, u.user_status, u.user_requested_at, u.user_approved_at, b.business_id, b.business_regist_num, b.business_name, b.business_address, b.business_post FROM user_table u LEFT JOIN business_table b ON u.user_id = b.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
